title: Proposed Land Exchange in Izembek National Wildlife Refuge Raises Legal Questions
summary: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE May 18, 2023 Contact: Aileo Weinmann | aileo@alaskawild.org Proposed Land Exchange in Izembek National Wildlife Refuge Raises Legal Questions Washington, D.C. – Today the Department of the Interior published a Notice of Intent to prepare a supplemental environmental review of a...
